architecture.summary: React 19 + Vite 6 + Tailwind v4 eval-ui in vskill CLI, served by custom Node.js HTTP server at src/eval-server/, HashRouter with existing workspace panels

integrations.summary: Existing API routes at /api/skills, /api/config, etc. No new backend endpoints needed. scanSkills() for local skill discovery across 4 project layouts

ui-ux.summary: Master-detail split-pane replacing sidebar nav, scrollable skill list with search/filter, tabbed detail view absorbing 6 workspace panels, New Skill button, category icons via Nano Banana Pro

performance.summary: Local-only UI serving discovered skills from filesystem, no pagination needed (local skill counts are small), instant panel switching via state management

security.summary: Local-only tool, no auth, no external data. Nano Banana Pro API key already available via VertexAI

edge-cases.summary: Empty state (no skills found), skill not found, multiple instances from different folders (hash-based port), 4 project layouts for skill discovery
